differential_diagnoses: Drug-induced or supplement-associated hepatotoxicity and cardiac conduction disturbance
next_steps: Transthoracic echocardiogram to assess cardiac structure and function
Cardiac MRI to evaluate for late gadolinium enhancement indicative of myocarditis
Lyme disease serology (ELISA followed by Western blot)
Continuous inpatient cardiac telemetry to monitor for high-grade atrioventricular block
Comprehensive review and toxicological screening of herbal supplements for hepatotoxins
Empiric intravenous ceftriaxone therapy while awaiting diagnostic confirmation of Lyme carditis
